description: This file defines styles for a sidebar component, including layout, positioning, and appearance for various sidebar elements, such as links and headings, utilizing media queries and Sass features like mixins and variables.
external_files: bootstrap variables and mixins (likely from Bootstrap's SCSS library)

methods.name: media-breakpoint-up
methods.description: Mixin for applying styles at viewport widths greater than or equal to the specified breakpoint.

methods.name: media-breakpoint-down
methods.description: Mixin for applying styles at viewport widths less than or equal to the specified breakpoint.

methods.name: media-breakpoint-between
methods.description: Mixin for applying styles between two breakpoints.

methods.name: subtract
methods.description: Function to calculate height by subtracting a value from 100vh.
